name: Failed login due to unregistered user
scenarioId: autenticacion/inicio_sesion:Failed login due to unregistered user
methodName: Failed login due to unregistered user

testSteps.description: Given I am on the login page

children.description: Usuario opens the browser at https://finance-app-ui.vercel.app/login

testSteps.description: When I log in with email "notregistered_xyz@test.com" and password "Pass123!"
Then the system displays the message "Correo o contraseña incorrectos"

children.description: Then mensaje alerta should be a string containing 'Correo o contraseña incorrectos'
